{{Infobox character
| name = Yan Shoumei
| introduced = Ghostwater
| name = Yan Shoumei
| aliases = Shoumei
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Redmoon Truegold, leader of the Redmoon Hall team, chosen of Reigan Shen, competitor in the Uncrowned, disciple of the Blood Sage, Uncrowned in Calan Archer's faction iconic Uncrowned of Redmoon Hall iconic Uncrowned iconic Overlady of Sailfin Port iconic Overlady
| abilities = Blood Shadow, blood madra, Striker techniques, Red Crystal technique, Midnight Rain technique
| affiliations = Redmoon Hall, Dreadgod cultist, Akura clan
| introduced = Ghostwater
}}

''See also: [[Yan Shoumei Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Yan Shoumei, also known as Shoumei, is a [[Redmoon]] [[Truegold]] from [[Redmoon Hall]] and the leader of her team. She possesses a distinctive appearance characterized by long black hair that often veils her face and pale, specter-like features. As a [[sacred artist]], she utilizes a [[Blood Shadow]] that functions as an extension of her abilities, acting as both a cloak and a weapon. This [[Shadow]] is noted for its potency, potentially making her as effective as two [[sacred artists]] of her rank. Her combat style involves specialized blood techniques, such as the [[Crusher]] technique and a defensive diamond-shaped red [[madra]] formation. Shoumei's history is marked by significant hardship; she was abandoned as an infant and raised by various families after being found by fishermen. She has faced intense personal struggle against a tyrant named [[Anagi]], who oppressed her town and family through heavy taxation and violence. In combat, she has demonstrated intense emotions, including rage and hatred, and has sustained severe injuries in battles. She is a chosen of [[Reigan Shen]] and has been involved in high-stakes matches, including one against [[Eithan]] Arelius.}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yan Shoumei]] wears deep red [[sacred artist]]'s robes.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a woman with hair like a [[veil]] and uses [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a [[Redmoon]] [[Truegold]] in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yan Shoumei]] is the leader of the [[Redmoon Hall]] team.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yan Shoumei]] is of [[Redmoon Hall]] and a chosen of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A disciple of the [[Blood Sage]] from [[Redmoon Hall]], Yan Shoumei is an [[Uncrowned]] fighter and a [[Dreadgod cultist]] who serves as the chosen of [[Reigan Shen]]. During her time in [[Ghostwater]], she appeared as a ghostly girl with a disordered spirit who had suffered grievous wounds during a match. As a competitor in the [[Uncrowned]] tournament, she fought within [[Calan Archer]]'s faction and interacted with [[Yerin]] and Calan. This [[Redmoon artist]] utilizes [[blood madra]], [[Striker techniques]], and a collection of specialized moves designed to synergize with her [[Blood Shadow]]. Her formidable capabilities include an [[Iron body]], the [[Divine Treasure]] known as the [[Ancient Scale]], and an [[Archlord weapon]] held within her [[soulspace]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a character that [[Eithan]] could potentially defeat.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a ghostly girl that [[Lindon]] faced in [[Ghostwater]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]]'s spirit was growing disordered.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] suffered grievous wounds during her match.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] was looking for information on [[Yan Shoumei]] in the records.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a competitor in the [[Uncrowned]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] was a disciple of the [[Blood Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is from [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a fighter in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a member of [[Redmoon Hall]] with black hair and one visible eye.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] wears [[sacred arts]] robes.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a character who interacts with [[Yerin]] and Calan.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a [[Dreadgod cultist]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is an [[Uncrowned]] in [[Calan Archer]]'s faction.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is mentioned in relation to a master.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a fighter [[Yerin]] must face.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Shoumei is a character who [[Forged]] a [[Red Crystal]] for protection.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Shoumei's technique involves a collection of blood techniques intended to synergize with a [[Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is the full name of Shoumei.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is the chosen of [[Reigan Shen]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] possesses the [[Ancient Scale]], a [[Divine Treasure]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] possesses an [[Archlord weapon]] in her [[soulspace]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] has an [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a [[Redmoon artist]] who uses [[Striker techniques]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] was gathering [[sword aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] competed against Sophara.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] gathered [[blood madra]] in her palms.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]] is the [[Uncrowned]] of [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yan Shoumei]]'s [[Blood Shadow]] provides a sense of more-than-physical strength.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yan Shoumei]] has an enhanced [[Shadow]] named [[Crusher]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Abandoned on a dock as an infant, Yan Shoumei was raised by six fishermen. After receiving training from the [[Akura clan]], she became a [[Redmoon Hall]] artist and eventually rose to the position of [[Overlady]] of [[Sailfin Port]]. As a [[Truegold]] [[Uncrowned]], she utilizes [[blood madra]] through the [[Red Crystal]] technique and wields a bow to summon her [[Midnight Rain]] technique. Her combat capabilities include an [[Iron body]] with a Silverscale quality, an [[Ancient Scale]] granted by [[Seshethkunaaz]], and a developing [[Blood Shadow]] that she can unleash.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]]'s [[Blood Shadow]] is developing.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] was abandoned on a dock as a baby.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] was raised by six fishermen.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses the [[Red Crystal]] technique.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] has an [[Iron body]] and an [[Ancient Scale]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] was trained by the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a [[Redmoon artist]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] can unleash her [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] is an [[Uncrowned]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] is the [[Overlady]] of [[Sailfin Port]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] is an [[Overlady]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] possesses a [[Silverscale Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] possesses an [[Ancient Scale]] received from [[Seshethkunaaz]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses the weapon [[Midnight Rain]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses a bow.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] uses the [[Midnight Rain]] technique.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] has a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] has an [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] was an [[Uncrowned]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] is a member of [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] is of [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yan Shoumei]] summons [[Midnight Rain]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|“But you are,” she said, gathering her Blood Shadow around her and dashing forward.”<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Yan Shoumei of Redmoon Hall,” the man said, “why have you called my name?”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
